MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-29-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-29-2004 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 from Dept. 206. for default prove-up. Michale Bonner, Esq. represented Plaintiff Beach Patrol, Inc. Witness John Wickhan was sworn and examined on behalf of the plaintiff. The matter set for court trial March 29, 2004. Defendant not present. There is no indication in the file of Defendant's motion to advance notice of motion to withdraw prior to today's hearing. The following exhibits were introduced, marked for identification and moved into evidence:

1) License Agreement dated 10/16/95
2) Addended to License Agreement of 7/5/96
3) Letter from Falletta of 2/27/01
4) Letter from Friedland of 2/27/01
5) Summary of Licensing Deed
6) Beach Patrol v Breaking Waves Interest Calculation Summary -3/25/04
7) Receipt 0 filing fee - Superior Court of 4/3/04
8) Invoice Guarantee Subp. Service - 6/5/03
9) Summary of Attorney Fees

After considering the evidence and finding of facts, the court grants judgment in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant as follows: Judgment: $230,000.00; Prejudgment Interest: $43,202.74; Attorney fees: $5,350.00; Costs: $334.45 for a total judgment of $278,887.19. Judgment signed in open court.
